---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Synapse
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear description of the problem. Example: "I'm always frustrated when ..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Extension Point

Which extension point does this feature relate to?

- [ ] **Source** — New data source
- [ ] **Processor** — New processing engine
- [ ] **Store** — New storage backend
- [ ] **Indexer** — New retrieval engine
- [ ] **Consumer** — New output format
- [ ] **Auditor** — New audit rule
- [ ] **CLI** — New command or flag
- [ ] **Schema** — Knowledge schema change
- [ ] **Plugin System** — Plugin management
- [ ] **Other** — Please describe

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case that would benefit from this feature.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.
